parameter.name: sensorId
parameter.label: Sensor ID
parameter.description: The sensor identifier that is used within the Hue Bridge.

parameter.name: on
parameter.label: Sensor Status
parameter.description: Enables or disables the sensor.

parameter.name: ledindication
parameter.label: LED Indication
parameter.description: Turns device LED during normal operation on or off. Devices might still indicate exceptional operation (Reset, SW Update, Battery Low).

parameter.name: tholddark
parameter.label: Threshold Dark
parameter.description: Threshold the user configured to be used in rules to determine insufficient light level (ie below threshold). Default value 16000.

parameter.name: tholdoffset
parameter.label: Threshold Offset
parameter.description: Threshold the user configured to be used in rules to determine sufficient light level (ie above threshold). Specified as relative offset to the "dark" threshold. Shall be >=1. Default value 7000.

parameter.name: sensorId
parameter.label: Sensor ID
parameter.description: The sensor identifier that is used within the Hue Bridge.

parameter.name: on
parameter.label: Sensor Status
parameter.description: Enables or disables the sensor.

parameter.name: ledindication
parameter.label: LED Indication
parameter.description: Turns device LED during normal operation on or off. Devices might still indicate exceptional operation (Reset, SW Update, Battery Low).

parameter.name: sensorId
parameter.label: Sensor ID
parameter.description: The sensor identifier that is used within the Hue Bridge.

parameter.name: ledindication
parameter.label: LED Indication
parameter.description: Turns device LED during normal operation on or off. Devices might still indicate exceptional operation (Reset, SW Update, Battery Low).

parameter.name: sensitivity
parameter.label: Sensitivity
parameter.description: The current sensitivity of the presence sensor. Cannot exceed maximum sensitivity.

parameter.name: sensitivitymax
parameter.label: Maximum Sensitivity
parameter.description: The maximum sensitivity of the presence sensor.

parameter.name: sensorId
parameter.label: Sensor ID
parameter.description: The sensor identifier that is used within the Hue Bridge.

parameter.name: on
parameter.label: Sensor Status
parameter.description: Enables or disables the sensor.

parameter.name: lightId
parameter.label: Light ID
parameter.description: The light identifier that is used within the Hue Bridge.

parameter.name: fadetime
parameter.label: Fade Time
parameter.description: Fade time in milliseconds for changing values.

parameter.name: lightId
parameter.label: Light ID
parameter.description: The light identifier that is used within the Hue Bridge.

parameter.name: lightId
parameter.label: Plug ID
parameter.description: The plug identifier that is used within the Hue Bridge.

parameter.name: fadetime
parameter.label: Fade Time
parameter.description: Fade time in milliseconds for changing values.

parameter.name: lightId
parameter.label: Plug ID
parameter.description: The plug identifier that is used within the Hue Bridge.

parameter.name: groupId
parameter.label: Group ID
parameter.description: The group identifier identifies one certain Hue group or room.

parameter.name: fadetime
parameter.label: Fade Time
parameter.description: Fade time in milliseconds for changing values.
